changeLog: Fix laggy / duplicated / dropped text paste in the input box. Ctrl+V used to synchronously spawn PowerShell (Get-Clipboard -Format Image) on every paste to check for a clipboard image, freezing the UI thread for the powershell cold-start. That stall let the held Ctrl+V auto-repeat, so ImGui's native text paste fired twice (and sometimes dropped). Now the clipboard image grab only runs when the clipboard has no text (checked via ImGui_GetClipboardText) — text pastes go straight through ImGui with no process spawn. ui.lua only.
